query:
ALTER TABLE `candidates` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `acceptRules` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `acceptMedia` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `acceptNewsletter` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `acceptCGU` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `acceptCGUAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `consentVersion` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'v1.0';
